meta.fretConvention: frets[] low E -> high E; -1 muted, 0 open, N = Nth fret in window (1 = baseFret). Absolute fret = baseFret + N - 1.

tiers.name: Open majors & minors
tiers.description: Foundational open 'cowboy' chords and power chords.

tiers.name: First hurdles, open 7ths & suspended
tiers.description: F/B hard-open shapes plus open 7th, maj7, m7, sus, add9.

tiers.name: Barre chords
tiers.description: Movable major/minor via E- and A-shape barres; CAGED.

tiers.name: Jazz voicings & altered dominants
tiers.description: Altered dominants, rootless/drop voicings, inversions & slash chords.
